title: Senior Java Backend Engineer
description: We are looking for a Senior Java Backend Engineer to design and build scalable microservices. You will work on high-throughput systems handling millions of requests per day.

title: Frontend React Developer
description: Join our frontend team to build responsive, accessible UI components using React and TypeScript. Experience with Tailwind CSS and state management is a plus.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure on AWS, and container orchestration with Kubernetes. Automate everything.

title: Product Designer
description: Design intuitive user experiences for our recruitment platform. Conduct user research, create wireframes, and deliver pixel-perfect mockups in Figma.

title: Technical Recruiter
description: Source and screen top engineering talent. Manage the full recruitment lifecycle from job posting to offer negotiation.
